Records.authors: Dubovyk, Ievgen, Freitas, Ayres, Gluza, Janusz, Grzanka, Krzysztof, Hidding, Martijn, Usovitsch, Johann
Records.description: Three-loop non-planar self-energy integral family with eight propagators and two ISPs ($q_1^2$ and $(q_2+p)^2$), arising from diagrams with top quarks and a photon. Six of the eight propagators carry top-quark mass $m_t$. Evaluated at $p^2=M_Z^2$ using DE transport with Euclidean boundary terms, achieving 10+ digit accuracy. The tenth propagator $(q_2+p)^2$ is linearly dependent and included as an auxiliary propagator for readability of tensor-rank results.
Records.location: Eq. (S6) in Supplemental Material, Section S.3
